title: festuca ampla subsp. simplex
intro: Festuca ampla subsp. simplex, also known as a type of grass, is a plant species belonging to the Poaceae family. It is used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which are attributed to its essential oils and flavonoids. The health benefits of Festuca ampla subsp. simplex include relieving respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma, and soothing skin irritations, while also exhibiting antimicrobial properties. The herbal preparations of this plant are typically made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, allowing for its medicinal properties to be harnessed and utilized for various health benefits.
